name: Beer Batter Fried Veggies 'n' Things
recipeIngredient: 1 Each Env. Golden Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Suggested Veggies 'n' Things:  (various vegetables)
2. In a deep fat fryer, heat oil to 375 degrees F.
3. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, beat together the golden onion soup mix, flour, baking powder, eggs, mustard, and beer until smooth and well blended. Let batter stand for 10 minutes.
4. Dip the suggested vegetables into the batter, then carefully drop into hot oil.
5. Fry, turning once, until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
6. Serve warm. Makes about 4 cups of vegetables.
